availability_header_desc: Define your weekly rhythm to help the AI Coach plan your workouts effectively.
basic_body_metrics_description: Used for BMR calculation and power/weight performance metrics.
basic_localization_ai_language_help: Language used for coaching insights and AI reports.
basic_localization_ui_language_help: Language used for the application menus and buttons.
basic_location_description: Used for weather forecasts and regional insights.
basic_login_methods_description: Manage how you sign in to Coach Watts.
basic_personal_info_description: Your basic identity and contact details.
comm_desc_billing: Notifications about your subscription, receipts, and payment status.
comm_desc_daily_coach: Receive an email every morning with your AI-powered training guidance.
comm_desc_marketing: Occasional emails with training tips, athlete stories, and community highlights.
comm_desc_plan_updates: Receive notifications when your training plan is adapted or updated.
comm_desc_product_updates: Be the first to know about new features and major improvements.
comm_desc_retention: Gentle reminders if you haven't logged wellness data or workouts recently.
comm_desc_threshold_updates: Receive notifications when your fitness thresholds change
comm_desc_unsubscribe_all: Instantly opt-out of all coaching nudges and product updates. You will still receive critical billing notices.
comm_desc_workout_analysis: Receive AI analysis of your completed workouts
comm_help_daily_time: When should we send your daily brief?
comm_toast_updated_desc: Your communication preferences have been saved.
goals_description: Define your objectives to help the AI Coach tailor your training plan.
goals_empty_desc: Set your first goal to get personalized training recommendations.
measurements_description: Log body measurements with the correct unit for each metric. Imported readings remain in the same history so you can review everything in one place.
measurements_empty_filtered: No history entries match the selected filters.
measurements_form_preferred_source_desc: Choose which source should win when values disagree.
measurements_modal_edit_desc: Update the value and notes for this measurement entry.
measurements_toast_added_desc: Your measurement history has been updated.
measurements_toast_deleted_desc: The incorrect entry has been removed from history.
measurements_toast_missing_edit_value_de: Enter a value before saving your edit.
measurements_toast_missing_name_desc: Enter a custom measurement name before saving.
measurements_toast_missing_value_desc: Enter a measurement value before saving.
nutrition_alert_missing_data_desc: Weight, Height, Date of Birth, and Sex are required to automatically calculate your BMR. Please update them in Basic Settings.
nutrition_desc_adaptive_engine: Advanced macro adaptation based on training phase and tolerance.
nutrition_desc_adaptive_engine_secondary: Fine-tune adaptive nutrition parameters and supplement strategy.
nutrition_desc_constraints: Define dietary preferences and exclusions to personalize meal planning.
nutrition_desc_enable: Activate periodized fueling guidance and metabolic tracking.
nutrition_desc_fuel_calibration: Calibrate fueling zones to match your glycogen state transitions.
nutrition_desc_hydration: Configure fluid and sodium targets for training and racing.
nutrition_desc_meal_schedule: Define your daily meal timing structure.
nutrition_desc_metabolic: Configure your physiological baseline for accurate fueling advice.
nutrition_desc_periodization: Fine-tune how your intake scales with training intensity.
nutrition_empty_meal_schedule: No meals configured yet. Add one to get started.
nutrition_help_bmr: Calories burned at rest. Auto-calculated based on your body metrics.
nutrition_help_calories_mode: How to determine your daily baseline before exercise.
nutrition_help_carb_goal: Your long-term objective for carb adaptation/gut training.
nutrition_help_carb_limit: What your gut can currently handle comfortably during high intensity.
nutrition_help_carb_slope: Global multiplier for how aggressively carbs scale with intensity (1.0 = Standard).
nutrition_help_deficit_desc: Recommended calorie deficit range for sustainable fat loss.
nutrition_help_dietary_profile: Choose patterns that define how meals should be generated.
nutrition_help_fat: Target grams of fat per kg of body weight.
nutrition_help_food_allergies: Allergens that must always be excluded from recommendations.
nutrition_help_food_intolerances: Foods that may cause symptoms and should be limited or excluded.
nutrition_help_fueling_sensitivity: Adjust how aggressively carbs increase with training demand.
nutrition_help_goal_profile: Your primary objective for body composition.
nutrition_help_lifestyle_exclusions: Lifestyle-based exclusions to align meals with your preferences.
nutrition_help_metabolic_floor: Default glycogen level when upstream data is unavailable (e.g. 60% = 0.6).
nutrition_help_post_window: Duration of prioritized protein/carb intake after exercise.
nutrition_help_pre_window: Minutes before exercise for final fueling.
nutrition_help_protein: Target grams of protein per kg of body weight.
nutrition_help_quick_add_volumes: Set the three bottle sizes shown in Hydration Quick Add.
nutrition_help_sodium: Target sodium concentration for your hydration strategy.
nutrition_help_supplements: Select the supplements you currently use for personalized timing advice.
nutrition_help_surplus_desc: Recommended calorie surplus range for quality lean mass gain.
nutrition_help_sweat_rate: Estimated liters of sweat lost per hour of exercise.
nutrition_help_target_calories: Calculated daily target after goal profile adjustment.
nutrition_help_training_phase: Apply metabolic presets based on your current training focus.
nutrition_help_weight: Foundation for relative macro targets (g/kg). Managed in Basic Settings.
nutrition_state1_desc: Low glycogen state; prioritize conservative fueling.
nutrition_state2_desc: Moderate glycogen state for standard mixed fueling.
nutrition_state3_desc: High glycogen demand; support peak performance fueling.
nutrition_supp_beta_alanine_desc: Buffers muscle acidity during high intensity
nutrition_supp_caffeine_desc: Pre-workout stimulant for focus and fatigue reduction
nutrition_supp_electrolytes_desc: Crucial for fluid balance and nerve function
nutrition_supp_nitrates_desc: Improves blood flow and oxygen delivery
nutrition_supp_probiotics_desc: Optimizes gut health and nutrient absorption
nutrition_supp_vitamin_d_desc: Essential for bone health and immune function
nutrition_toast_bmr_calc_desc: Your BMR has been set to {bmr} kcal/day based on your profile.
nutrition_toast_missing_data_desc: Please ensure weight, height, date of birth, and sex are set in Basic Settings.
nutrition_toast_saved_desc: Your metabolic profile has been updated.
sports_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to remove this sport profile?
sports_description: Manage thresholds and zones for specific activity types.
sports_empty_desc: Connect to Intervals.icu to sync your profile or add a sport manually.
sports_form_cooldown_help: Auto-shrink cooldown segments to this duration (min).
sports_form_eftp_help: Estimated FTP based on your best efforts from activity data.
sports_form_hr_load_type_help: Model used to calculate HR training load (HRSS is recommended).
sports_form_indoor_ftp_help: Power target override for indoor sessions
sports_form_load_priority_help: Which data source to prioritize for training load calculation.
sports_form_pmax_help: The maximum power you can generate for 1 second.
sports_form_resting_hr_help: Activity-specific resting HR if different from global.
sports_form_spikes_help: Data points exceeding FTP by this % will be filtered.
sports_form_threshold_pace_help: Your threshold pace in m/s (used for pace-based load).
sports_form_warmup_help: Auto-shrink warmup segments to this duration (min).
sports_form_wprime_help: Anaerobic work capacity: the total work you can do above FTP.
sports_modal_autodetect_desc: We found changes in your connected apps (like Intervals.icu) for your sport profiles. Review them below:
sports_toast_autodetect_basic_desc: Updates found for basic profile stats. Switch to the Basic Settings tab to review.
sports_toast_autodetect_none_desc: Your sport profiles are already in sync.
sports_toast_settings_copied_desc: Copied settings from {name}. Review and save changes.
trophy_empty_desc: Your peak performances are waiting. Go out, push your limits, and Coach Watts will celebrate you here.
zones_empty: No zones defined. Click "Add Zone" or "Calculate" to start.
missing_fields_guide_description: These fields are needed for accurate coaching, training load, and zone calculations. Use the buttons below to jump directly to each one.
missing_field_ftp_desc: Go to Sport Settings, open your default profile, and enter your FTP in watts. This calibrates power-based workouts and training load.
missing_field_weight_desc: Enter your current body weight in Basic Settings under Body Metrics. It is used for power-to-weight metrics and nutrition guidance.
missing_field_hrr_desc: Go to Sport Settings, open your default profile, and enter Max HR and Resting HR. If unsure, use 220 minus your age for Max HR and your morning resting pulse for Resting HR.
missing_field_zones_desc: In Sport Settings, enter LTHR or Max HR on your default profile, then use Recalculate to generate heart rate zones.
